prompt: A wide 16:9 illustration of a developer workspace with two AI coding assistants working together. Left side shows a terminal-like panel with code and architecture diagrams; right side shows a faster, more experimental code probe panel. Between them floats a small cute pixel-art owl mascot observing both. Soft cinematic lighting, dark desk, muted blue-green and gold accents, nature-meets-tech mood. no text, no letters, no watermark, no brand marks.
